headline: NVIDIA’s Sovereign AI Deals And Meta Alliance Shape Valuation Debate
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) has agreed a multiyear partnership with Meta to deploy millions of Blackwell and Rubin GPUs and expand confidential computing for privacy focused AI. In India, the company is supporting one of Asia’s largest AI superclusters with Yotta Data Services and backing a sovereign AI venture under India's AI Mission. NVIDIA hardware powers India's first "Make in India" supercomputer and new sovereign and secure AI factories in Australia and Canada. Additional alliances include...
